'''âk-j-g-h''' ('''kakajgehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tincture|tincture]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-g-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tincture|tincture]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-j-g-h
|-
! Lemma
| kakajgehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikajgehoko|thikajgehoko]] || [[word:jikajgehoko|jikajgehoko]] || [[word:shikajgehoko|shikajgehoko]] || [[word:kikajgehoko|kikajgehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukajgehoko|thuthukajgehoko]] || [[word:jujukajgehoko|jujukajgehoko]] || [[word:shushukajgehoko|shushukajgehoko]] || [[word:kukukajgehoko|kukukajgehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokajgehoko|thokajgehoko]] || [[word:jokajgehoko|jokajgehoko]] || [[word:shokajgehoko|shokajgehoko]] || [[word:kokajgehoko|kokajgehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkajgehoko|thĂŠkajgehoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkajgehoko|jĂŠkajgehoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkajgehoko|shĂŠkajgehoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkajgehoko|kĂŠkajgehoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakajgehoko|thakajgehoko]] || [[word:jakajgehoko|jakajgehoko]] || [[word:shakajgehoko|shakajgehoko]] || [[word:kakajgehoko|kakajgehoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakajgehithi|shakajgehithi]] || [[word:shakajgehiji|shakajgehiji]] || [[word:shakajgehishi|shakajgehishi]] || [[word:shakajgehiki|shakajgehiki]]
